```{r}
  # Only consider vessels that actually had drainplugs
  filter(`Drainplugs Present`) %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(
    count_with_dp = sum(count),                           # total vessels with drainplugs
    total_vessels = sum(dp_tbl_yearly$count[dp_tbl_yearly$Year == Year]),  # total inspected that year
    percent_with_dp = percent(count_with_dp / total_vessels)               # % with drainplugs
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(Year, count_with_dp, percent_with_dp)

# Example: counts and percentages for drainplugs not removed (by year)
wc_dp_not_rm_yearly <- dp_tbl_yearly %>%
  filter(`Drainplugs Removed`) %>%
  select(Year, count, compliance_percentage)

```

###### 2024

In 2024, `r wc_with_dp_yearly[wc_with_dp_yearly$Year == 2024, "count_with_dp"]` of inspected watercraft were recorded to have drainplugs (`r wc_with_dp_yearly[wc_with_dp_yearly$Year == 2024, "percent_with_dp"]` of watercraft inspections after June 18th, 2024).

Of these watercraft, `r wc_dp_not_rm_yearly[wc_dp_not_rm_yearly$Year == 2024, "count"]` were compliant in having removed drainplug(s) upon arrival at station (`r wc_dp_not_rm_yearly[wc_dp_not_rm_yearly$Year == 2024, "compliance_percentage"]`).

###### 2025

In 2025, `r wc_with_dp_yearly[wc_with_dp_yearly$Year == 2025, "count_with_dp"]` of inspected watercraft were recorded to have drainplugs (`r wc_with_dp_yearly[wc_with_dp_yearly$Year == 2025, "percent_with_dp"]` of watercraft inspections after June 18th, 2024).

Of these watercraft, `r wc_dp_not_rm_yearly[wc_dp_not_rm_yearly$Year == 2025, "count"]` were compliant in having removed drainplug(s) upon arrival at station (`r wc_dp_not_rm_yearly[wc_dp_not_rm_yearly$Year == 2025, "compliance_percentage"]`).

## Drain Plugs Removed - Permanent Station

```{r}
# 1️⃣ Prepare drainplug summary (ensure Year column exists)


drainplugs_summary <- drainplugs_summary %>%
  mutate(Year = lubridate::year(Start_Time))


drainplugs_for_plot <- drainplugs_summary %>%
  filter(Watercraft_Has_Drainplugs_Ind == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(Drainplug_Not_Removed = !Drainplug_Removed_at_Inspection_Ind)


w_with_plugs_facet <- make_bar_with_lbls(
  data = drainplugs_for_plot,
  y_var_label = "Inspections - With Drainplugs",
  station_filter = permanent_stations,
  year_filter = c(2024, 2025),
  x_var = "Station",
  reorder_x_by_y = TRUE,
  fill_var = "Year",
  label_cutoff = 5,
  highlight_field = "Drainplug_Not_Removed",  # now red = non-compliant
  ggplotify = TRUE,
  add_sep_lines = FALSE
)

# Display
w_with_plugs_facet


```

```{r}

## Pull the Plug Compliance - by Month - under construction

#            str_detect(Station,"Scheduled Inspection"))) %>%

#                     labels = c("TRUE" = "Removed", "FALSE" = "Not Removed")) +

#   theme_minimal() +
#   theme(
#     legend.position = 'bottom',
#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5)
#   )
```

## Pull the Plug Compliance - by Source Jurisdiction

```{r}
compl_by_sj = drainplugs_summary |> 
  dplyr::ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::rename("Drainplug<br>Removed" = Drainplug_Removed_at_Inspection_Ind) |> 
  dplyr::select(prev_j = Previous_Waterbody_1_Province_Or_State,
                Watercraft_Has_Drainplugs_Ind,
                `Drainplug<br>Removed`) |> 
  dplyr::filter(Watercraft_Has_Drainplugs_Ind) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(prev_j = forcats::fct_lump(prev_j, n = 10)) |> 
  dplyr::count(prev_j,
               `Drainplug<br>Removed`,
               name = "count", 
               sort = T) |>  
  dplyr::group_by(prev_j) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(total_c = sum(count)) |> 
  dplyr::ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total_c)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(prev_j = as.factor(prev_j)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(prev_j = forcats::fct_inorder(prev_j))
  
perc_compl_by_sj = compl_by_sj |> 
  dplyr::group_by(prev_j) |> 
  dplyr::reframe(perc = paste0(100*round(count / sum(count),2),"%"),
                   `Drainplug<br>Removed`) |> 
  dplyr::ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::filter(`Drainplug<br>Removed`) |> 
  dplyr::distinct()

y_level_for_plot = 1.1*max(compl_by_sj$total_c)
  
ggplot(compl_by_sj)  +
  geom_col(aes(x = prev_j,
               y = count, 
               fill = `Drainplug<br>Removed`)) +
  geom_text(aes(x = prev_j, y = y_level_for_plot, label = perc),
            data = perc_compl_by_sj) +
  big_text +
  theme(legend.position = 'bottom') + 
  labs(x = "Previous Jurisdiction", fill = "Drainplug Removed")
```

## Blowby Timing - Across All Stations

```{r}

blowb = blowb |> 
  filter(blow_by_time > 2024)

blowb |> 
  filter(blow_by_time > 2024) |> 
  dplyr::select(blow_by_time) |> 
  mutate(blow_by_char = as.character(blow_by_time)) |> 
  mutate(hours = stringr::str_extract(blow_by_char,"[0-9]{1,2}:.*")) |> 
  mutate(hours = lubridate::hms(hours)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(the_hour = lubridate::hour(hours)) |> 
  dplyr::count(the_hour) |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(x = the_hour, y = n)) +
  labs(x = "Hour of Day", y = "Number of Blowbys") +
  big_text



```

## Blowby Timing - By Station

```{r}
blowby_by_station = blowb |> 
  filter(blow_by_time > 2024) |> 
  filter(
    !str_detect(Station, "Scheduled|Roving|Outreach")
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(Station,blow_by_time) |> 
  # dplyr::filter(!Station %in% c()) |> 
  dplyr::filter(!stringr::str_detect(Station,'Scheduled')) |>
  mutate(blow_by_char = as.character(blow_by_time)) |> 
  mutate(hours = stringr::str_extract(blow_by_char,"[0-9]{1,2}:.*")) |> 
  mutate(hours = lubridate::hms(hours)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(the_hour = lubridate::hour(hours)) |> 
  dplyr::count(the_hour,Station)

blowby_by_station |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(the_hour,y=n,fill = Station)) + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Station) + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none') + 
  labs(y = "Number of Blowbys",
       x = "Hour of Day") + 
  big_text + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none')
```

## Blow Bys Divided by Total Inspections

```{r}
insp_by_station <- d |> 
  filter(!str_detect(Station, "Scheduled")) |> 
  mutate(Station = case_when(
    Station == "Osooyos" ~ "Osoyoos",
    TRUE ~ Station
  )) |> 
  mutate(
    TimeOfInspection = case_when(
      Station == "Radium" ~ with_tz(as.POSIXct(TimeOfInspection, tz = "UTC"), tzone = "America/Edmonton"),
      Station %in% c("Dawson Creek", "Golden", "Olsen", "Cutts (Hwy 93)", "Yahk") ~ with_tz(as.POSIXct(TimeOfInspection, tz = "UTC"), tzone = "America/Edmonton"),
      TRUE ~ with_tz(as.POSIXct(TimeOfInspection, tz = "UTC"), tzone = "America/Vancouver")
    ),
    the_hour = hour(TimeOfInspection)
  ) |> 
  count(Station, the_hour, name = "inspections")

blowbys_by_total_insp_fig = blowby_by_station |> 
  dplyr::rename(blowbys = n) |> 
  dplyr::left_join(insp_by_station) |>
  dplyr::group_by(the_hour) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(blowbys = sum(blowbys),
                   inspections = sum(inspections)) |> 
  dplyr::ungroup() |> 
  dplyr::mutate(blowby_by_insp = round(blowbys / inspections,3)) |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(x=the_hour, 
               y = blowby_by_insp)) + 
  labs(y = "# Blowbys / # Inspections", x = "Hour of Day") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) + 
  big_text + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none')

ggplotly(blowbys_by_total_insp_fig,
         width = 1000,
         height = 600)
```

```{r insp_by_stations}

# # # Base ggplot
# p <- ggplot(insp_by_station, aes(x = the_hour, y = inspections, text = paste0("Station: ", Station, "<br>Hour: ", the_hour, "<br>Inspections: ", inspections))) +
#   geom_col(fill = "#2c7fb8") +
#   facet_wrap(~ Station, scales = "free_y") +

#     title = "Inspections per Hour by Station"

#   theme_minimal() +

#     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
#   )

# ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text")

```

## Blow Bys Divided by Total Inspections, by Station

```{r}
blowbys_by_total_insp_station_fig = blowby_by_station |> 
  filter(!str_detect(Station, "Radium|Other")) |> 
  dplyr::rename(blowbys = n) |> 
  dplyr::left_join(insp_by_station) |>
  dplyr::mutate(blowby_by_insp = round(blowbys / inspections,3)) |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(x=the_hour, 
               y = blowby_by_insp,
               fill = Station)) + 
  facet_wrap( ~ Station) + 
  labs(y = "# Blowbys / # Inspections", x = "Hour of Day") + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  big_text + 
  theme(legend.position = 'none')

ggplotly(blowbys_by_total_insp_station_fig,
         width = 1000,
         height = 600)
```

## COS Inbox Summary (2022 - 2024)

```{r}

# non-2024 data
cos_d = openxlsx::read.xlsx("Z:/2 SCIENCE - Invasives/SPECIES/Zebra_Quagga_Mussel/Communications/Inspection data reporting/Final report/2023/GIS Maps and Excel Figures/2023_CBSA_sorting_results_MB.xlsx",
                            sheet = "summary_figure")

# 2024
cos_24 = openxlsx::read.xlsx("Z:/2 SCIENCE - Invasives/SPECIES/Zebra_Quagga_Mussel/Communications/Inspection data reporting/Final report/2024/GIS Maps and Excel Figures/ExcelFigures/COS inbox notifications 2024.xlsx",
                            sheet = "sorted")

cos_25 = openxlsx::read.xlsx("C:/Users/JPHELAN/OneDrive - Government of BC/R_projects/long_term_projects/AIS_ZQMussels/data/2025 COS inbox summary.xlsx",
                            sheet = "Summary")
names(cos_25)<-c("category", "2025")

cos_24 = cos_24[,c(6,7)]

names(cos_24) = c("category","2024")

cos_24 = cos_24 |> 
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(`2024`))

cbsa_24 = cos_24 |> 
  dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(category,"CBSA")) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(Location = stringr::str_remove_all(category,
                                                   "CBSA ")) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(Location = stringr::str_squish(Location)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(Location = ifelse(Location == 'Rooseville',
                                  'Roosville',
                                  Location)) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(Location = stringr::str_to_title(Location)) |> 
  dplyr::select(-category)


cbsa_25 = cos_25 |> 
  filter(str_detect(category, "CBSA")) |> 
  mutate(Location = category |> 
           str_remove("^CBSA - ") |>   # <— FIX: removes "CBSA - "
           str_remove("^CBSA ") |>      # also removes "CBSA " for others
           str_squish() |>
           str_replace("^Rooseville$", "Roosville")) |> 
  dplyr::select(-category)
  


cos_d = cos_d |> 
  dplyr::full_join(cbsa_24) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), \(x) tidyr::replace_na(x, 0)))

cos_d = cos_d |> 
  dplyr::full_join(cbsa_25) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::everything(), \(x) tidyr::replace_na(x, 0)))


cos_d |> 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(-Location) |> 
  dplyr::filter(name %in% c("2023","2024", "2025")) |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_col(aes(x = Location, y = value, fill = name),
           position = position_dodge2()) +
  facet_wrap( ~ Location, nrow = 1, scales = 'free_x', strip.position = "bottom") + 
  big_text +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = 'grey', fill = 'transparent'),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 13, angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1),
        strip.clip = "off") + 
  labs(y = 'Number of Notifications',
       fill = "Year",
       x = "CBSA Crossing Locations")
```


## Commercially Hauled by Station

```{r}

more_stations<- c(permanent_stations, part_time_station)

all_dat |> 
  dplyr::filter(Commercially_Hauled_Ind) |> 
  dplyr::filter(Station %in% more_stations) |> 
make_bar_with_lbls(
  y_var_label = "Commercially Hauled Inspections\nPermanent Stations 2025",
  year_filter = 2025,
  fill_var = "Station",
  station_filter = 'none',
  label_cutoff = 10,
  ggplotify = T
  )

```
